modules.module_title: Introduction to Professional Domestic Help, Grooming & Hygiene
Home Management, Kitchen Etiquette, Safety & Waste Disposal
Handling Home Appliances, Electrical Safety & Emergency Contacts
Child Care, Elder Care Assistance & Safe Home Environments
Effective Communication, Politeness, Conflict Resolution & Phone Etiquette
Professional Ethics, Client Confidentiality, Honesty & Self-Management

questions.question: Domestic Helper Etiquette & Training ka primary objective kya hota hai?

options.A: Helper me cleanliness, home management skills, polite communication aur professional work ethics build karna
options.B: Only cooking restaurant style fast foods daily
options.C: Operating heavy commercial delivery trucks

questions.explanation: Domestic help training helper ko client ke house me manners, systematic home maintenance safety aur polite communications sikhata hai.

questions.question: Domestic helper personal hygiene me daily check kya recommended hai before starting work?

options.A: Nails cut and clean rakhna, clean clothes pehenna aur body clean maintain karna (prevents food contamination)
options.B: Wearing heavy gold rings and strong perfumes
options.C: Using dirty working uniforms from yesterday

questions.explanation: Clean fingernails aur tidy clothing client kitchen and baby care settings me pathogen contamination prevent karte hain.

questions.question: Client ke house me telephone calls ya door bells answer karte waqt politely kya respond karna chahiye?

options.A: Polite greeting (namaste/hello), brand name/family identity confirmation, and speaking in calm clear voice
options.B: Screaming loudly or cutting call immediately
options.C: Sharing client family financial details with caller

questions.explanation: Polite phone manners and greeting represent helper professionalism, making visitors feel welcome and respected.

questions.question: Kitchen food waste and bathroom wet waste garbage disposal checks me green and blue bins difference?

options.A: Green bin for wet organic kitchen waste, Blue bin for dry recyclable plastic/paper waste
options.B: Mixing all plastic bags and wet foods in single bin
options.C: Green bin is for electric battery disposal

questions.explanation: Wet organic and dry waste segregation environment protection and clean garbage disposal operations ensure karta hai.

questions.question: Client house electric iron (dhobi istree) use karne ke baad safety guidelines checks kya hain?

options.A: Unplug plug from socket immediately, place iron upright in safe metal stand, and let it cool completely
options.B: Leave iron face down on cotton shirt active plugged in
options.C: Wipe hot iron plate using wet sponge immediately

questions.explanation: Active plugged irons left unattended house fires and skin burn accidents cause karte hain. immediate unplug is standard guideline.

questions.question: Professional boundaries loops checks me client family personal conflicts ya arguments ke dauran helper ka behavior?

options.A: Remain completely neutral, focus on assigned household duties, and avoid taking sides or gossiping with neighbors
options.B: Participate actively in family arguments supporting one side
options.C: Record secret audio clips to share on internet

questions.explanation: Helper must respect client home privacy. Avoiding interference preserves job security and mutual respect loops.

questions.question: Household chemicals usage safety checks did toilet cleaner acid bottles can be stored near food storage shelves?

options.A: No, strictly store toilet cleaners/bleaches in locked low cupboards away from food items and child reach
options.B: Yes, mixing both on same dining tables is safe
options.C: Chemicals should be stored inside refrigerator

questions.explanation: Chemical fumes and accidental cross-contamination risk food poisoning. Isolated storage is basic safety rule.

questions.question: Kitchen cooking safety checks 'Oil pan catches fire' what is the helper safety response?

options.A: Turn off gas burner, slide flat metal lid over pan (smothering), never throw water on oil fires
options.B: Throw bucket of tap water on boiling oil pan
options.C: Run out of house screaming without turning gas off

questions.explanation: Water drops trigger steam explosions in oil fire, spreading flames. Smothering metal lid cuts oxygen paths safely.

questions.question: Domestic helper communication 'Receiving instructions' when client explains a recipe/task list what should helper do?

options.A: Listen carefully, note down key points, and repeat instructions back to client to confirm understanding
options.B: Nod head without listening and guess details later
options.C: Argue that method is wrong continuously

questions.explanation: Repeating back tasks details prevents miscommunication errors, saving time and raw materials wastes.

questions.question: Professional honesty checks if helper breaks expensive crystal bowl accidentally while washing?

options.A: Immediately inform client, apologize politely, and explain how it happened honestly
options.B: Hide shards in dustbin base and blame house cat
options.C: Pretend nothing happened and continue working
options.D: Argue that bowl was already broken

questions.explanation: Honesty in accident reporting secures long-term career trusts, whereas lies lead to immediate terminations.

questions.question: Home management checks 'Dusting methods' why damp wiping is preferred over dry dusting?

options.A: Damp cloth traps dust particles instead of dispersing them into air (reduces allergy risks)
options.B: Damp wiping requires more expensive cloths
options.C: Dry dusting removes rust stains

questions.explanation: Damp microfiber traps pollen/soot particles inside pores, preventing airborne spreads in living rooms.

questions.question: Electrical appliance safety check did pulling power plug by wire cords is safe practice?

options.A: No, always hold plug head and pull (pulling wire cords breaks internal copper threads, risking short circuits)
options.B: Yes, pulling wire from distance is safer
options.C: Dono have identical safety levels

questions.explanation: Wire stress damages insulation coatings over time, forming exposed wires that trigger electric shocks.

questions.question: Child safety checks 'Bath tub supervision' if helper is bathing client baby and doorbell rings?

options.A: Wrap baby in towel and carry baby along to gate (never leave baby in water unattended for even one second)
options.B: Leave baby sitting in water tub and run to door quickly
options.C: Ignore doorbell for hours

questions.explanation: Drowning accidents happen silently within 1 inch of water. constant physical presence is child care mandate.

questions.question: Polite conversation etiquette 'Interrupting client' when client talks with guests what helper does?

options.A: Wait for conversation pause, say 'excuse me politely', and state urgent message briefly
options.B: Shout message from kitchen gate loudly
options.C: Stand closely staring at guests silently

questions.explanation: Respecting privacy borders and using polite interrupt protocols preserves client household decorum.

questions.question: Domestic helper business layouts 'Emergency contacts list' where list is placed in home?

options.A: On prominent place (like refrigerator door) containing numbers of parents, family doctor, police and ambulance
options.B: Hidden in helper pocket notebook only
options.C: Locked inside client personal office drawers

questions.explanation: Visible emergency sheets ensure rapid help calls if baby chokes, falls occur or fire breakouts occur.

questions.explanation: Wet organic and dry waste segregation environment protection and clean garbage disposal operations ensure karta hai.

options.B: Yes, mixing both on same dining tables is safe

options.B: Damp wiping requires more expensive cloths
options.C: Dry dusting removes rust stains

questions.explanation: Damp microfiber traps pollen/soot particles inside pores, preventing airborne spreads in living rooms.

options.B: Leave baby sitting in water tub and run to door quickly
options.C: Ignore doorbell for hours

questions.question: Client guest protocol 'Serving tea/water' what is standard polite serve direction?

options.A: Serve guests first, then family members (placing cup gently to right side of guest)
options.B: Serve kids first, then throw cups on desks
options.C: Serve helper first then clients

questions.explanation: Serving guests first and placing items on right side is standard hospitality etiquette, displaying high breeding.

questions.question: Kitchen safety 'Cleaning gas ovens' what precaution is taken before chemical sprays?

options.A: Turn off main cylinder regulator valve and ensure stove knobs are closed (preventing accidental gas leaks)
options.B: Keep oven active hot during sprays
options.C: Leave gas venting open to speed cleanups
options.D: No gas shut off is required

questions.explanation: Gas leaks combined with aerosol propellant sprays pose extreme spark ignition and fire hazards.

questions.question: Home appliance safety 'Washing machine overload' how helper loads clothes?

options.A: Load up to 3/4 drum capacity loosely (avoid stuffing tightly which damages motor balance)
options.B: Stuff clothes to maximum tightness using force
options.C: Run machine with single sock only daily

questions.explanation: Loose packing leaves tumbling space, ensuring clean wash cycles and protecting motor belt wear.

questions.question: Politeness boundaries 'Knocking closed doors' what is the standard protocol?

options.A: Knock gently twice, wait for vocal permission 'come in' before turning handle
options.B: Push door open suddenly without warning knocks
options.C: Peep through keyholes silently first
options.D: No knocks are required in home jobs

questions.explanation: Knocking closed doors respects family privacy borders, preventing embarrassing/awkward intrusions.

questions.question: Helper business setups 'Shift Log entry' why daily logs are filled?

options.A: Logs daily tasks completed, grocery cash balance spent, and lists missing supplies to prevent disputes
options.B: Calculates government income taxes
options.C: Links directly with AdSense systems

questions.explanation: Documented logs protect helpers from allegations of laziness, proving actual task completions.

questions.question: Serving tea guests right?

options.A: Serve guests first, then family members (placing cup gently to right side of guest)
options.B: Serve kids first, then throw cups on desks
options.C: Serve helper first then clients

questions.explanation: Serving guests first and placing items on right side is standard hospitality etiquette, displaying high breeding.

questions.explanation: Knocking closed doors respects family privacy borders, preventing embarrassing/awkward intrusions.

questions.question: Helper business shift log?

options.A: Logs daily tasks completed, grocery cash balance spent, and lists missing supplies to prevent disputes

options.C: Links directly with AdSense systems

questions.explanation: Documented logs protect helpers from allegations of laziness, proving actual task completions.

questions.question: Kitchen safety 'Cleaning blender jar' safest cleaning technique for sharp blades?

options.A: Fill blender half-way with warm soapy water, cover lid, run machine for 15 seconds, rinse (avoid touching blade directly)
options.B: Reach fingers deep down inside jar with rough scrubber sponge
options.C: Wipe active rotating blades with fingers
options.D: Blender jars do not require cleaning

questions.explanation: Blender blades are razor sharp. Self-spinning soap water cleans jar corners without finger cut hazards.

questions.question: Client data privacy 'Credit cards/bills left on table' how helper acts?

options.A: Put documents inside folder/drawer safely, never read details or copy numbers (respect client data privacy)
options.B: Take photo of cards to show family
options.C: Leave papers open near trash bins
options.D: Use card details to order items

questions.explanation: Absolute confidentiality of family bank papers is core ethical requirement for domestic workers.

questions.question: Home hygiene checks 'Toilet brush sanitization' where is toilet brush stored after cleaning?

options.A: Let brush dry inside stand holder after rinsing with disinfectant (never store soaking wet)
options.B: Leave wet brush directly on bathroom carpet
options.C: Keep brush inside kitchen sink drawers

questions.explanation: Wet enclosed spaces breed bacteria. Rinsing, drying, and keeping stand clean halts bathroom mold spores.

questions.question: Etiquette checks 'Addressing client family members' how helper names them politely?

options.A: Use formal honorifics (eg 'Sir', 'Ma'am', 'Didi') as agreed upon during hiring, avoiding informal nicknames
options.B: Call clients by first names directly
options.C: Make up funny names for kids

questions.explanation: Using respect titles maintains professional boundaries, preserving hierarchical dignity inside home spaces.

questions.question: Helper business setups 'Inventory check sheet' what items are logged weekly?

options.A: Detergents volume, garbage bag counts, toilet cleaners status, alerting client to restock before runs dry
options.B: Client bank card numbers registry
options.C: Employee salary slips history

questions.explanation: Tracking supplies logs prevents unexpected outages, ensuring household operations run smoothly.

questions.explanation: Tracking supplies logs prevents unexpected outages, ensuring household operations run smoothly.

questions.question: Kitchen safety procedures 'Dry floor rules' when liquid spills occur on kitchen tiles what helper does?

options.A: Wipe immediately, place 'wet floor' marker or alert family members, and dry fully (prevents slip injuries)
options.B: Leave liquid to dry naturally by room air fan
options.C: Sprinkle dry flour dust on wet patch

questions.explanation: Kitchen spills are major household fall hazards. Quick dry wipes secure safety for kids and elderly.

questions.question: Domestic helper grooming 'Fragrance rules' why strong heavy perfumes are restricted?

options.A: Can trigger asthma attacks or severe allergies in babies or sensitive family members
options.B: Perfumes lower cloth fabric life
options.C: Strong scents attract insect pests

questions.explanation: Infant airways and sensitive sinuses react poorly to aerosol chemicals. Neutral soap cleanliness is standard.

questions.question: Home safety proofing 'Staircase safety' why stairs are kept clear of toys/slippers?

options.A: Tripping hazard (cluttered steps cause severe high-fall injuries at night)
options.B: Toys gather carpet dust on stairs
options.C: Stair objects ruin wood veneers

questions.explanation: Cluttered stairs are invisible trip hazards in low light. Keeping steps clear protects seniors from fatal hip falls.

questions.question: Client communication 'Phone message recording' how helper logs phone callers?

options.A: Write caller name, phone number, message details and call time on message pad next to phone
options.B: Memorize message and repeat if helper remembers
options.C: Ignore phone messages completely
options.D: Tell callers to call back later only

questions.explanation: Documenting message details keeps clients informed of business calls, showcasing organizational reliability.

questions.question: Helper business setups 'Contract boundaries' why wage rates for overtime are logged on contract?

options.A: Secures helper from unpaid labor hours, establishing clear rules if shift hours extend beyond normal
options.B: Calculates local municipal utility taxes
options.C: Required by Google AdSense codes

questions.explanation: Declaring hourly rates for overtime avoids exploitation disputes, maintaining healthy employee-employer terms.

questions.question: Kitchen safety 'Food storage temperatures' what is safe hot food cooling step before fridge storage?

options.A: Let hot food cool down to room temperature for max 1-2 hours before placing inside refrigerator
options.B: Place boiling hot soups inside fridge immediately (warms up fridge interior, spoiling other foods)
options.C: Leave hot food on table for 2 days to cool fully

questions.explanation: Boiling pots inside fridge spike internal temps, pushing stored dairy/meats into bacterial Danger Zones.

questions.question: Client privacy 'Telephone messages' did helper can share family schedule details with unknown callers?

options.A: No, simply say 'Sir/Ma'am is not available at moment, I can take your name and number'
options.B: Yes, tell caller when family leaves house empty for holidays
options.C: Share cell numbers of clients directly

questions.explanation: Giving family schedules to strangers leaks property vulnerability indicators, risking robbery hazards.

questions.question: Kitchen hygiene checks 'Dish sponge sanitation' how often is washing sponge replaced?

options.A: Every 2-4 weeks or immediately if smelling sour (sponges harbor high bacterial counts)
options.B: Once a year only hamesha
options.C: Sponge never requires replacements

questions.explanation: Wet dish sponges trap grease and moisture, multiplying bacteria. Scheduled swaps ensure clean dish washings.

questions.question: Politeness boundaries 'Handling feedback' how helper reacts if client criticizes cleaning quality?

options.A: Listen calmly, apologize for oversight, and re-clean spot immediately (avoid angry arguments)
options.B: Argue that spot is clean and walk away
options.C: Threaten to resign immediately

questions.explanation: Accepting constructive feedback and re-cleaning shows professional work maturity, securing job positions.

options.C: Lowers local tax slabs

questions.explanation: Visual bill logs secure helper integrity, validating that client cash was spent strictly on home supplies.

questions.question: Seniors home safety 'Anti-skid bath mats' why placed inside bathroom tubs?

options.A: Prevents slippery soap runs from causing elderly falls and bone fractures
options.B: Decorates bathroom layout themes
options.C: Mutes shower water sounds

questions.explanation: Elderly balance is fragile. Slip-proof rubber mat textures provide essential bath support.

questions.question: Kitchen safety checks 'Knife storage' what is standard safety guideline?

options.A: Store knives inside slots blocks or custom drawers pointing blades down (never leave loose inside washing sink)
options.B: Leave knives loose on kitchen table borders
options.C: Drop blades point up inside cutlery holders

questions.explanation: Reaching blindly into soapy sink water traps hand cut risks. Slot blocks secure blade handles safely.

questions.question: Domestic helper behavior 'Punctuality boundaries' what is standard rule if helper runs late?

options.A: Call or message client immediately, state reason, and give estimated arrival time (avoid arriving late without notice)
options.B: Arrive late silently and pretend timing was correct
options.C: Ignore shifts completely if late by 30 minutes

questions.explanation: Early late-alerts show respect for client schedules, allowing families to adapt their planning timings.

questions.question: Home hygiene checks 'Toilet rim disinfection' why separate cleaning cloths are used?

options.A: Blocks transfer of fecal bacteria (coliforms) to living room tables and kitchen areas
options.B: Separate cloths dry toilet faster
options.C: Reduces detergent solution usage

questions.explanation: Segregating bathroom cloths isolates pathogens, preventing serious cross-infection spreads.

options.A: Validates honesty credentials, ensuring zero history of child abuse or home thefts before placements
options.B: Required by Google AdSense checks
options.C: Lowers helper salary rates

questions.explanation: Clean background verifications build client hiring trust, securing helper career placements.

questions.question: Kitchen safety 'Microwave cleaning' how helper cleans splattered food steam spills safely?

options.A: Microwave bowl of water with lemon slices for 3 minutes to loosen steam splatters, then wipe clean (avoid scrubbing metal)
options.B: Scrub interior using wire steel pads
options.C: Wipe inside with heavy bleach sprays directly

questions.explanation: Lemon steam softens dried splatters, letting wipes clear dirt without scratching interior wall coatings.

questions.question: Domestic helper grooming 'Nail manicure care' why long artificial nails are restricted?

options.A: Trap organic waste and germs below nail edges, risking food contamination and baby skin scratches
options.B: Nails reduce cleaning speeds
options.C: Artificial nails are highly flammable

questions.explanation: Long nails block thorough hand scrub sanitizing. Short, natural fingernails maintain hygienic childcare limits.

questions.question: Home safety proofing 'Wet floor mopping' what is standard helper rule?

options.A: Mop in small sections, warn family members, or place yellow 'Wet Floor' warnings until tiles dry
options.B: Mop entire living room floor and lock gates silently
options.C: Leave floors wet without warning notices

questions.explanation: Slippery wet tiles are severe fall risks. Warnings prevent children and seniors from taking slip drops.

questions.question: Client communication 'Confidential family information' how helper handles family news heard at home?

options.A: Keep absolute silence, never share details with neighbors, family friends or internet groups
options.B: Discuss details with neighborhood helpers
options.C: Post family news on personal social pages

questions.explanation: Respecting household privacy is the fundamental ethic of domestic helpers, securing career longevity.

questions.question: Helper business records 'Overtime shift logging' why start and end times are noted?

options.A: Documents actual working hours, ensuring correct billing and overtime payroll compensations
options.B: Required by Google AdSense checks
options.C: Lowers local tax filings slabs

questions.explanation: Written timing logs verify overtime demands, protecting helpers from wage dispute errors.

questions.question: Microwave lemon steam clean?

options.A: Microwave bowl of water with lemon slices for 3 minutes to loosen steam splatters, then wipe clean (avoid scrubbing metal)
options.B: Scrub interior using wire steel pads
options.C: Wipe inside with heavy bleach sprays directly

questions.explanation: Lemon steam softens dried splatters, letting wipes clear dirt without scratching interior wall coatings.

questions.question: Domestic Helper Etiquette & Training final launch audits why contract signing is key final step?

options.A: Validates boundary alignments, hourly pay rates, holiday policies and duties list to secure helper career
options.B: Video editing file sizes compression
options.C: Subtitles translate tools automatic

questions.explanation: Signed employment agreements stabilize workspace terms, protecting domestic workers from disputes.

questions.question: Grooming standard nails hair clean?

options.A: Nails cut and clean rakhna, clean clothes pehenna aur body clean maintain karna (prevents food contamination)
options.B: Wearing heavy gold rings and strong perfumes
options.C: Using dirty working uniforms from yesterday

questions.explanation: Clean fingernails aur tidy clothing client kitchen and baby care settings me pathogen contamination prevent karte hain.

questions.question: Telephone manners greeting polite?

options.A: Polite greeting (namaste/hello), brand name/family identity confirmation, and speaking in calm clear voice
options.B: Screaming loudly or cutting call immediately
options.C: Sharing client family financial details with caller

questions.explanation: Polite phone manners and greeting represent helper professionalism, making visitors feel welcome and respected.

questions.question: Wet waste green dry waste blue?

options.A: Green bin for wet organic kitchen waste, Blue bin for dry recyclable plastic/paper waste
options.B: Mixing all plastic bags and wet foods in single bin
options.C: Green bin is for electric battery disposal

questions.explanation: Wet organic and dry waste segregation environment protection and clean garbage disposal operations ensure karta hai.

questions.question: Iron safety checks unplug metal?

options.A: Unplug plug from socket immediately, place iron upright in safe metal stand, and let it cool completely
options.B: Leave iron face down on cotton shirt active plugged in
options.C: Wipe hot iron plate using wet sponge immediately

questions.explanation: Active plugged irons left unattended house fires and skin burn accidents cause karte hain. immediate unplug is standard guideline.

questions.question: Neutral stance family arguments?

options.A: Remain completely neutral, focus on assigned household duties, and avoid taking sides or gossiping with neighbors
options.B: Participate actively in family arguments supporting one side
options.C: Record secret audio clips to share on internet

questions.explanation: Helper must respect client home privacy. Avoiding interference preserves job security and mutual respect loops.

questions.question: Chemicals locked cupboard food?

options.A: No, strictly store toilet cleaners/bleaches in locked low cupboards away from food items and child reach
options.B: Yes, mixing both on same dining tables is safe
options.C: Chemicals should be stored inside refrigerator

questions.explanation: Chemical fumes and accidental cross-contamination risk food poisoning. Isolated storage is basic safety rule.

questions.question: Oil fire slide lid burner?

options.A: Turn off gas burner, slide flat metal lid over pan (smothering), never throw water on oil fires
options.B: Throw bucket of tap water on boiling oil pan
options.C: Run out of house screaming without turning gas off

questions.explanation: Water drops trigger steam explosions in oil fire, spreading flames. Smothering metal lid cuts oxygen paths safely.

questions.question: Listening repeat instructions details?

options.A: Listen carefully, note down key points, and repeat instructions back to client to confirm understanding
options.B: Nod head without listening and guess details later
options.C: Argue that method is wrong continuously

questions.explanation: Repeating back tasks details prevents miscommunication errors, saving time and raw materials wastes.

questions.question: Polite honesty break glass bowl?

options.A: Immediately inform client, apologize politely, and explain how it happened honestly
options.B: Hide shards in dustbin base and blame house cat
options.C: Pretend nothing happened and continue working
options.D: Argue that bowl was already broken

questions.explanation: Honesty in accident reporting secures long-term career trusts, whereas lies lead to immediate terminations.
